dialogue.speaker: IKHAN
dialogue.line: For a second there, I didn't even think you were tardy. You are so confident.

dialogue.speaker: SHINWOO
dialogue.line: Wait, I've never seen you before.

dialogue.speaker: RAI
dialogue.line: Hm?

dialogue.speaker: IKHAN
dialogue.line: I'm done. Oh my... I'm gonna die.

dialogue.speaker: SHINWOO
dialogue.line: Hey, you're the...

dialogue.speaker: IKHAN
dialogue.line: You know this guy?

dialogue.speaker: SHINWOO
dialogue.line: No sir, I just met him today.

dialogue.speaker: TEACHER
dialogue.line: Is that so? So you have never seen him before, either? Kuk? It's...

dialogue.speaker: IKHAN
dialogue.line: Your first time too? Maybe he's a transfer student?

dialogue.speaker: SHINWOO
dialogue.line: Hm? The whole school would know of somebody with a face like that!

dialogue.speaker: IKHAN
dialogue.line: Oh, look, he's just...

dialogue.speaker: TEACHER
dialogue.line: Yes, I believe you are right, Shinwoo, right?

dialogue.speaker: TEACHER
dialogue.line: Did you transfer here today?

dialogue.speaker: RAI
dialogue.line: Mn.

dialogue.speaker: TEACHER
dialogue.line: You should have told me earlier.

dialogue.speaker: TEACHER
dialogue.line: Hm. So, which school are you from?

dialogue.speaker: TEACHER
dialogue.line: Not very talkative, huh? Who taught you your manners, to answer with just a nod?

dialogue.speaker: TEACHER
dialogue.line: I'm talking to you, answer my question!

dialogue.speaker: IKHAN
dialogue.line: You tell him, sir!

dialogue.speaker: SHINWOO
dialogue.line: Oh!?

dialogue.speaker: IKHAN
dialogue.line: Wh-what did he just say?

dialogue.speaker: RAI
dialogue.line: He said he is from far away.

dialogue.speaker: TEACHER
dialogue.line: I see, he's from far away.

dialogue.speaker: TEACHER
dialogue.line: Hm, I guess he lived overseas. That must be it.

dialogue.speaker: IKHAN
dialogue.line: His looks are Korean enough, but something feels slightly off.

dialogue.speaker: SHINWOO
dialogue.line: Hm hm~ He looks like he could be foreign as well.

dialogue.speaker: IKHAN
dialogue.line: Hey, are you possibly of mixed-descent, or a foreigner?

dialogue.speaker: SHINWOO
dialogue.line: Yup, we were right.

dialogue.speaker: IKHAN
dialogue.line: Compared to you, he definitely has a completely different vibe!

dialogue.speaker: SHINWOO
dialogue.line: Also, look at his legs! They're so much longer than yours! Hahahaha!

dialogue.speaker: IKHAN
dialogue.line: You're right! It was the same for me when I compared you to his looks! Hahaha! You guys are basically different species, sir, kekeke!

dialogue.speaker: SHINWOO
dialogue.line: Hm?

dialogue.speaker: TEACHER
dialogue.line: Shinwoo Han.

dialogue.speaker: TEACHER
dialogue.line: You'll be responsible for taking him to the chairman.

dialogue.speaker: SHINWOO
dialogue.line: Sir?

summary: A new, mysterious transfer student named Rai arrives at school, immediately drawing the attention of Shinwoo and Ikhan. The teacher struggles to get a proper answer from the quiet Rai, who only states he's from 'far away', leading the students to speculate about his foreign origins and unique appearance. Shinwoo is then tasked with taking Rai to the chairman.
